UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user within the system, encompassing Super Admins, Restaurant Admins, and End Customers. It stores non-authentication related profile information and their assigned roles.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for communication and identification, but not for direct authentication data storage.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

role.description: The primary role of the user within the system (e.g., 'super_admin', 'restaurant_admin', 'customer').

phoneNumber.description: The user's phone number, optional for customers but potentially required for restaurant admins.

restaurantId.description: Optional reference to a restaurant for restaurant admins.

Restaurant.title: Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Represents a specific restaurant managed within the platform, including its operational details, localization settings, and payment configurations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Restaurant entity.

name.description: The official name of the restaurant.

description.description: A brief description of the restaurant.

address.description: The street address of the restaurant.

city.description: The city where the restaurant is located.

stateProvince.description: The state or province where the restaurant is located.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the restaurant's location.

country.description: The country where the restaurant is located.

phoneNumber.description: The main contact phone number for the restaurant.

email.description: The primary email address for the restaurant.

websiteUrl.description: The official website URL for the restaurant.

adminUserIds.description: References to UserProfile IDs who have administrative access to this restaurant. (Relationship: Restaurant N:N UserProfile)

deliveryChargeAmount.description: The standard delivery charge amount set by the restaurant.

enabledPaymentMethods.description: A list of payment method identifiers (e.g., 'paypal', 'cash_on_delivery') that are enabled for this restaurant.

currency.description: The primary currency used by the restaurant for pricing and transactions (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR', 'GBP').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the restaurant entity was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the restaurant entity was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's placed order, including details about the customer, restaurant, payment, and delivery.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the customer who placed the order.

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant where the order was placed.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'accepted', 'preparing', 'out_for_delivery', 'delivered', 'cancelled', 'rejected').

totalAmount.description: The final total amount of the order.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Collection name is 'users' to match app implementation.
